findings.evidence: The large bull line-art graphic on the right side of the title slide is completely missing from the HTML.

findings.description: Loss of two-column layout and grid
findings.evidence: The side-by-side layout with text on the left and a grid of statistics/images on the right is flattened into a single vertical column.
The four distinct columns of text listing locations below the map are collapsed into a single column in the HTML.
The side-by-side layout of text and image collage is flattened into a single vertical sequence.
The text and image pairs are flattened from a two-column layout into a single column.
The side-by-side layout of text and the globe graphic is flattened into a single column.
The line art graphic depicting wind turbines and buildings at the bottom of the page is missing in the HTML.
The three circular images and their corresponding text, arranged in three columns in the PDF, are stacked vertically into a single column in the HTML.

findings.description: Diagram missing and rendered as plain text
findings.evidence: The 'Mapping Strategy' block diagram is missing entirely. Its textual content (e.g., 'Site Usage', 'Building Usage', 'M U') has been extracted and dumped as an unstructured text list.
The side-by-side layout of text and the pie chart is flattened into a single column.

findings.description: Process flow diagram missing and rendered as plain text
findings.evidence: The 'Water Example - Process Flows' complex diagram is missing entirely. The labels from within the diagram (e.g., 'Building Utility', 'RO Reject tank') appear as a long, unstructured vertical text list, losing all context.
The side-by-side placement of the photo and the line art graphic at the bottom is flattened.
The small bar chart with a leaf icon in the bottom right corner is missing.
The two distinct columns comparing 'Inactivation Skid Optimization' and 'Distillation Optimization' are flattened into a single column.
The two distinct columns comparing water savings projects are flattened into a single column.
The large continuous line art graphic illustrating a globe, medical items, and people is missing from the HTML.

findings.description: Minor text artifact inclusion on Slide 2.
findings.evidence:
HTML contains '

170 countries

' (and '170' appears again earlier) which does not appear in the visual text of the source PDF slide 2. This is likely carried over from an OCR artifact.

findings.description: Fragmented hyperlink in footnote on Slide 2.
findings.evidence: The link 'https://companiesmarketcap.com/pharmaceuticals/largest-pharmaceutical-companies-by-market-cap/' is split across multiple adjacent <a> tags with hyphenated anchor text, though the URL destination remains accurate.
